summary: Mobile Responsiveness Verification PASSED. All CSS media queries at max-width: 768px and 480px are working correctly. Teacher tabs (Chapters, Homework, Create Test, PYQ Papers, AI Content) display VERTICALLY stacked on mobile. Student subject cards display in single column. Header elements (logo, language toggle, Student/Teacher toggle, avatar) fit within 375px mobile viewport without horizontal overflow.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - API may not be implemented

issues: React hydration warning: span cannot be child of select/option - minor console warning, does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness CSS verified working. Teacher tabs use .teacher-tabs class with flex-direction: column on mobile. Subject cards use .subjects-grid with single column on mobile. All tested at 375x812 mobile viewport.

tests_performed.details: Logo, language toggle (ગુજરાતી NEW), Student/Teacher toggle, and avatar all fit within 375px viewport without overflow
All 5 tabs (Chapters, Homework, Create Test, PYQ Papers, AI Content) stack vertically with ~39.5px spacing. Each tab has width=343px (full width with padding)

tests_performed.test: Teacher Subject Dropdown and Add Subject Button
tests_performed.details: Both elements displayed properly on mobile
subjects-grid uses grid-template-columns: 343px (single column) on mobile. Cards display one per row
Greeting 'Hi [Name], Which subject do you want to study today?' displays properly on mobile
Chapters and Previous Year Questions sections stack vertically on mobile
No horizontal scrollbar detected on any page. scrollWidth = clientWidth = 375 on all tested views
Profile dropdown (View Profile, Parent Dashboard, Logout) fits within mobile viewport
